description: Coverage floor for the four assessment Core Requirements. The deterministic core_requirements contract MUST cover every scenario_id below every run; the builders MUST emit the 8-field test cases + a 4-folder Postman collection. Guarded by G14–G17 and test_core_requirements.py / test_core_gates.py.
postman_request_naming: every request is '<test_case_id> — <title>' and maps 1:1 to a row in its agent's cases.json (same id AND title)
postman_coverage: G19: every test case that is an API call (steps contain 'Send <METHOD> /path') must appear as a request in its agent's folder; agents with no API-call cases require none
